business_definition: Discount-adjusted sales amount from TPCH line items
calculation_note: Sum of extended price multiplied by one minus line discount
known_gap: TPCH is not real POS and has no store channel or return semantics

business_definition: Gross margin divided by net sales
calculation_note: Uses TPCH partsupp supply cost as a cost proxy and recomputes from additive numerator and denominator
known_gap: Supply cost is not a retail cost accounting model

business_definition: Distinct order count at the mart fixed grain
calculation_note: Do not sum category-level order_count after dropping category_name
known_gap: Needs requested-grain distinct count or a separate order mart for higher-grain questions

calculation_note: Use discount_amount divided by gross_sales rather than averaging stored rates
known_gap: TPCH discount is not a promotion calendar or campaign entity
Requires inventory snapshots or supply-demand events
Requires campaign calendar and counterfactual or baseline data
Requires store dimension and comparable-store flags
